zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强修复格局
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD维持低位震荡偏强格局，价格略高于20日均线，短线多头尝试修复，但上方抛压仍存，整体趋势仍偏震荡上行修复结构。

MACD柱值为正，动能略占优，但信号线缺失不完整，短期趋势依赖价格突破确认。均线系统中价格站上20日均线，形成支撑区域。

下方支撑位关注0.179与0.178附近，若跌破则回测0.172均线支撑。上方阻力位在0.181及0.185区域，突破需放量确认。

操作建议以低多为主，回踩0.179-0.178区间可分批试多，止损设0.172下方。若放量突破0.181则顺势追多，短线不宜追空，保持区间交易思路。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading around 0.179843 after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.54%, suggesting short-term consolidation rather than a decisive reversal. The session range between 0.17917 and 0.181281 reflects relatively contained volatility, with sellers maintaining a slight advantage while buyers continue defending nearby support. Despite the minor pullback, the broader technical picture remains constructive because price is holding comfortably above the 20-period simple moving average, indicating that the prevailing intermediate trend still favors gradual upside momentum.

The 20-period SMA at 0.17228190 provides an encouraging technical foundation, as the current market remains meaningfully above this dynamic support level. Although the RSI reading is unavailable, the positive MACD value of 0.0050088282 suggests bullish momentum has not fully faded, even if buying pressure appears to be moderating. Traders should monitor whether momentum continues to strengthen or begins flattening, as confirmation from additional indicators would improve confidence in the next directional move.

Immediate support is located near the intraday low around 0.17917, with stronger technical support developing closer to the 20-period SMA near 0.1723. On the upside, initial resistance appears near the recent high at 0.181281. A sustained breakout above that level could attract additional buying interest and open the path toward higher resistance zones, while repeated rejection there may encourage short-term profit-taking and extend the current consolidation phase.

From a trading perspective, bullish participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed close above 0.181281 before adding exposure, as this would strengthen the case for continued upward momentum. More conservative buyers could also watch for controlled pullbacks toward support that hold above the moving average before considering new positions. Conversely, a decisive break below 0.17917, particularly if accompanied by weakening momentum, would increase the probability of a deeper retracement toward the 0.1723 support region, making disciplined risk management and carefully placed stop-loss orders especially important.
